title: Marketplace Manager - Specsmakers - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Specsmakers - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the Specsmakers family as a Marketplace Manager in Kolkata. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Specsmakers:
Specsmakers is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Specsmakers!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
